summary: Comprehensive testing completed for TA Engine application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings for 'setMarkers' function and unknown object types (triangle, rsi_series, atr_band)
WebSocket connection failures (403 errors) but not affecting functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/ta/setup - TA Setup API with patterns and levels
GET /api/broker/list - All brokers including Coinbase available
Tab navigation (Research, Chart Lab, Hypotheses) functional
Header action buttons (Refresh, Share, Screenshot, Save Idea) present and clickable
Technical analysis data displayed correctly with patterns and levels
